response.justification: Bogdan is a strong candidate whose experience aligns remarkably well with the problem domain, despite not having recent C++ experience. His long-term development of GISCollective, an open-source geospatial data platform, is directly relevant to building routing data pipelines. This, combined with his experience in high-performance, low-latency distributed systems (using DLang, a systems language) at Dunnhumby, suggests he has the right skills and mindset to excel in this role and quickly ramp up on the required C++ or Rust stack.
strengths: Deep, multi-year experience building and maintaining a geospatial data platform (GISCollective), a near-perfect domain match.
Proven experience with high-performance, low-latency distributed systems and systems programming (DLang).
Demonstrated history of working across the full stack and learning new technologies, as required by the job description.
concerns: Professional C++ experience is not recent, dating back to 2015.
Most recent roles have focused on TypeScript/Node.js, which is not the primary technology for this position.
No explicit experience with creating 'routing tiles' or navigation-specific data pipelines, though his GIS work is closely related.
